semantics.pass: Metric is present and at or below the warning threshold.
semantics.warn: Metric exceeds the warning threshold, or source-only reporting cannot measure a configured runtime size. WARN is visible evidence but not a hard gate.
semantics.fail: Only emitted when policyMode is hard-gate and a threshold explicitly enables failOnExceed.
semantics.waived: A threshold is exceeded or not directly measurable, but an explicit waiver reason is present.

formalWaiver.reason: Runtime-size thresholds remain warning-only for limited beta because dependency and chunk refactors are explicitly out of scope; WARN rows have owners and dates, and future hard-gate activation requires reviewed threshold policy change.

thresholds.label: Largest JavaScript asset raw size

remediation.plan: Review route-level chunking or lazy-loading in a separate audited task before any hard-gate activation.

thresholds.recommendation: Review route-level chunking or lazy-loading in a separate audited task before any production-scale claim.

thresholds.label: Largest JavaScript asset gzip size

remediation.plan: Track compressed JS trend and propose chunk ownership changes in a separate reviewed task.

thresholds.recommendation: Track gzip size as release evidence; do not refactor chunks in this reporting task.

thresholds.label: Largest CSS asset raw size

remediation.plan: Review CSS ownership and unused rules separately with UI regression coverage.

thresholds.recommendation: Review CSS ownership and unused rules in a separate UI regression task.

thresholds.label: Largest CSS asset gzip size

remediation.plan: Track compressed CSS trend and defer style optimization to a separate reviewed UI task.

thresholds.recommendation: Track compressed CSS size without changing build behavior.

thresholds.label: pdfjs-dist installed size

remediation.plan: Review pdfjs-dist isolation only in a dedicated OCR/PDF regression task.

thresholds.recommendation: Keep pdfjs-dist risk visible; replacement or isolation requires OCR/PDF regression evidence.

thresholds.label: pdf-parse installed size

remediation.plan: Review pdf-parse replacement only with deterministic parser and OCR regression evidence.

thresholds.recommendation: Keep pdf-parse risk visible; do not replace without deterministic parser regression evidence.

thresholds.label: pdfmake installed size

remediation.plan: Review packet PDF dependency isolation only with packet/PDF regression evidence.

thresholds.recommendation: Keep packet PDF generation dependency risk visible without changing packet output.

thresholds.label: Docker OCR/PDF runtime package inventory

waiver.reason: Docker package byte sizes are not measurable from this source-only report; Poppler/Tesseract package names are inventoried and any future package change requires OCR/parser regression evidence.

thresholds.recommendation: Treat Docker OCR package changes as review-required; this task does not change Docker packages.
